name: mv-ia
description: Backend Node.js com Groq e Evolution API para fluxo de qualificação via WhatsApp

scripts.build: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/routes/webhook.routes.js && node --check src/flows/qualification.flow.js && node --check src/services/groq.service.js && node --check src/store/session-store.js && node --check src/utils/webhook-normalizer.js
